summary: Frontend-only MVP for RoomieSwipe tested via Playwright on mobile viewport (390x844). All 4 tabs render and navigate correctly; Roommates screen shows swipe card with photo, name/age, gender pill, and € budget pill; like/nope buttons advance the deck; liking profiles populates the Matches tab reactively; filter sheet opens with all gender chips and sliders, Apply updates the filter pill summary and visible cards; Apartments tab shows scrollable apartment cards; Profile tab shows hero + stats (matches count); Home does not page-scroll. No backend testing requested.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, use boxShadow (cosmetic, non-blocking)
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents (cosmetic, non-blocking)
React 19 warning: 'Accessing element.ref was removed in React 19. ref is now a regular prop.' Originates from third-party lib; no functional impact.

action_items: Optional polish: replace deprecated shadow* StyleSheet keys with boxShadow on web or guard via Platform.select to silence warnings.
Optional: move pointerEvents from prop to style on the actions overlay View in roommates.tsx.
critical_code_review_comments: matches store uses a module-level singleton with useSyncExternalStore — works for in-memory MVP; consider persisting (AsyncStorage) if data should survive reload.
SwipeDeck deckKey based on filter values forces a fresh stack on filter changes — good UX, but it also resets the index when filters change, which is intentional and correct.
seed_data_creation: None — mock profiles in src/data/profiles.ts used as-is.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testIDs from the spec are present and resolvable: roommates-screen, swipe-card-top, like-button, nope-button, filter-open-button, filter-sheet-title, filter-gender-{All|Female|Male|Non-binary}, filter-age-min-slider, filter-age-max-slider, filter-budget-slider, filter-apply-button, filter-reset-button, matches-screen, match-card-<id>, apartments-screen, apartment-card-<id>, profile-screen, tab-{roommates|matches|apartments|profile}. After 2 likes on the default deck, Matches tab showed 2 match cards (Liam, Sofia). Applying 'Female' updates the filter pill summary correctly to 'Female · 18-30 · ≤€1000'. Home screen confirmed non-scrolling (window.scrollY delta = 0 after scrollBy 500).
